channel.title: Descending5ths on A J Greengrove's Site
channel.description: Recent content in Descending5ths on A J Greengrove's Site

item.title: It's Time to Set The Sails
item.description: It’s Time to Set The Sails: I ripped of an unknown composer’s “Forest Theme” from Terra Incognita, a net yarozee demo game.

item.title: Autumn Moon Dance
item.description: Autumn Moon Dance: This dance-like motive unfolds in a so-called minor-variant romanesca.

item.title: Waltz with Me Moose Giants
item.description: Waltz with Me Moose Giants: a chameleon motive, very useful for weaving counterpoint.

item.title: Chilly Nights, Quiet Winds
item.description: Chilly Nights, Quiet Winds: a meandering motive searchs out and seeks, perhaps for a warmer breeze.
